headline: Marc Cucurella
body: ⚪️🕐 Marc Cucurella: “My Real Madrid signing happened so fast. Everything happened in 36-48 hours”. “That's how I prefer it, no headaches. I'm so happy now”. https://t.co/D2uwGkv5Re
text:
⚪️🕐 Marc Cucurella: “My Real Madrid signing happened so fast. Everything happened in 36-48 hours”.

“That's how I prefer it, no headaches. I'm so happy now”. https://t.co/D2uwGkv5Re
